title: Schematic Energistics
description: A mod that connects Create's Schematicannon to AE2 network.
body: # Schematic Energistics Adds the Cannon Interface - a block that connects Create's Schematicannon to the AE2 network and its autocrafting system.   ## Features - Automatically extracts required items from AE2 storage - Can autocraft schematic items when needed - Refill gunpowder automatically - Available for Neoforge 1.21.1 and Forge 1.20.1 - Works on Create 0.5.1 and Create 6   ## Usage Place the Cannon Interface next to a Schematicannon and connect it to the AE2 network. The Schematicannon will detect only one Cannon Interface at a time. The Schematicannon will always prioritize other containers (chest, barrels, etc) before requesting items from the AE2 network.    ## Credits [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
